candidates.why: Revenue-related line, but appears to be a component/subset of revenue in some years rather than the full top line.
Best match for total top-line revenue across years; represents the reported total revenue line.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrual, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability/accrual line, not revenue.
Deferred/prepaid balance sheet item, not revenue.
Balance sheet deferred income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total revenue line rather than component revenue rows.

candidates.why: Direct input/material cost line; best match for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Inventory asset component on the balance sheet, not an expense line.

variables.notes: Chosen as the direct production/service cost line on the income statement.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket and good SG&A component candidate.
Classic SG&A/overhead component.
Capitalization-related R&D line, not a standard overhead expense component.
Operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component if not a total.

Operational metric, not expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. No explicit SG&A subtotal appears. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded COGS, D&A, and totals.

candidates.why: Capitalized development is not a dedicated R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Amortization disclosure, not core current-period R&D expense.
Amortization line below operating disclosures/supplemental, not dedicated R&D expense.
Impairment line, not recurring R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost total that includes non-interest items such as FX; less preferred than granular recurring components.
Best direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost, but likely already included in Interest Expenses in years shown.
Recurring finance-cost component; can supplement interest expense if not captured elsewhere.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and likely overlaps with reported Interest Expenses.
Balance sheet accrual, not period finance expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost rows and avoided Financial Expenses because it includes FX/non-interest items. Excluded lease-interest row to avoid likely double counting with Interest Expenses.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line within comprehensive income, not a balance sheet equity balance.
Liability-related concept, not equity.
Best available equity balance on the balance sheet.
Shareholder count, not equity balance.
Balancing/subtotal helper row, not preferred when a real equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet total, not equity only.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is available, so Total Equity is used as the best available book equity measure.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview.
